summary: Update mode testing complete. All GM side improvements verified: 1) Campaign Settings button visible in header with 4 upload sections modal (Custom Rulesets, Races & Classes, Items & Spells, Monsters & NPCs), 2) GM Screen Names tab uses gold colors (#F59E0B), 3) GM Screen Tables tab Shop Name uses gold color, 4) GM Screen Party tab displays correctly. Previous features (landing page pricing tiers, player Coming Soon overlay, level up flow, edit character, HP clamping) all verified working.
